productDisplayName: Puma Men Fashion Cat Navy Blue Slipper
description: A perfect way to rest your feet on those casual days is by slipping into these ultra cool and comfortable Fashion cat puma slippers. With a leather footbed and crafted with a simple silhouette, this pair makes for a great domestic wear as well as with jeans and t-shirts.UpperLeather straps that have twill tape inner lining in a thong style, with a toe separatorErgonomically raised and mildly padded footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with horizontal grooves for ease of movement and enhanced gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
